info.title: Hotel Booking System API
info.description: Simple Hotel Booking System REST API - OpenAPI 3.0 Documentation

tags.name: AI Search
tags.description: Natural language hotel and room search powered by Claude AI (Anthropic). Accepts plain English queries and returns matching hotels and/or available rooms. Requires USER or ADMIN role.

tags.name: Hotel Management
tags.description: CRUD operations for hotels, including image upload/download. GET endpoints require USER or ADMIN role. Write endpoints require ADMIN role.

tags.name: Booking Management
tags.description: APIs for creating and managing hotel room bookings. Guests (USER/ADMIN) can create bookings and view their own. All admin-level read and write operations require ADMIN role.

tags.name: Payment Management
tags.description: Mock payment APIs for processing and refunding hotel room booking payments. No real payment gateway is involved — all transactions are simulated.

tags.name: Room Management
tags.description: CRUD operations for hotel rooms, including image upload/download. GET endpoints require USER or ADMIN role. Write endpoints require ADMIN role.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: APIs for user registration and login

get.description: Retrieves a single room by its database ID.

put.description: Fully replaces room details by ID. The hotel cannot be changed on update. To update only the image, use `POST /{id}/image` instead.

get.description: Retrieves a single hotel by its database ID.

put.description: Fully replaces hotel details by ID. Supply all fields you want to keep — omitted optional fields are cleared. To update only the image, use `POST /{id}/image` instead.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the hotel and all its rooms. (ADMIN only)

get.description: Retrieves a single booking by its database ID. (ADMIN only)

put.description: Updates booking details by ID. The room cannot be changed on update. If new dates are provided, totalPrice is recalculated automatically. To change status/payment, include bookingStatus or paymentStatus in the body. (ADMIN only)

400.description: Validation failed or invalid date range

409.description: Room already booked for selected dates

delete.description: Permanently deletes a booking by ID. (ADMIN only)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of rooms. All filter parameters are optional and combinable. Valid `sortBy` values: `id`, `roomNumber`, `price`, `weekendPrice`, `roomType`, `bedType`, `maxOccupancy`, `floorNumber`, `roomSizeInSqFt`, `status`.

parameters.name: roomType
parameters.description: Filter by room type. Allowed: SINGLE, DOUBLE, SUITE, DELUXE, FAMILY

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status. Allowed: AVAILABLE, BOOKED, MAINTENANCE, OUT_OF_SERVICE

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Filter by active flag. true = bookable rooms only

post.description: Creates a room under an existing hotel. **roomNumber**, **price**, and **hotelId** are required. All other fields are optional. The response includes **`hotelName`** (denormalized for display) and **`hasImage`** (`true` when an image has been stored). To attach an image, use the dedicated `POST /{id}/image` endpoint after creation.

get.description: Returns the raw image bytes with the correct `Content-Type` header. Use this URL directly as the `src` of an `` tag. Returns 404 if no image has been uploaded.

404.description: Room not found or no image uploaded

post.description: Uploads an image file and stores it as a BLOB in the database. Accepted types: **image/jpeg**, **image/png**, **image/webp**, **image/gif**. Re-uploading replaces the previous image. After a successful upload, **`hasImage`** will be `true` in the room response. Use `GET /{id}/image` directly as the `` to display it in the UI. (ADMIN only)

file.description: Image file (jpeg/png/webp/gif). Field name must be `file`.

200.description: Image uploaded — full room details returned

400.description: File is empty or not an image type

delete.description: Removes the stored image BLOB from the database. (ADMIN only)

post.description: Refunds the payment for a PAID booking. On success, bookingStatus becomes CANCELLED and paymentStatus becomes REFUNDED. Only ADMIN can issue refunds.

400.description: Booking is not in PAID status

post.description: Processes a mock payment for a PENDING booking. The amount must match the booking total price. On success, bookingStatus becomes CONFIRMED and paymentStatus becomes PAID. Returns a mock transactionId (e.g. TXN-A1B2C3D4).

409.description: Booking is already paid or refunded

get.description: Returns a paginated list of hotels. All filter parameters are optional and can be combined freely. Valid `sortBy` values: `id`, `name`, `location`, `city`, `country`, `starRating`, `hotelType`, `checkInTime`.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by. Allowed: id, name, location, city, country, starRating, hotelType, checkInTime

parameters.name: hotelType
parameters.description: Filter by hotel type. Allowed values: BUDGET, LUXURY, BOUTIQUE, RESORT, BUSINESS

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Filter by active status. Omit to return all; pass `true` for active only, `false` for inactive only

post.description: Creates a hotel with full details. Only **name** and **location** are required. All other fields (description, address, starRating, hotelType, checkInTime, amenities, etc.) are optional. To attach an image, use the dedicated `POST /{id}/image` endpoint after creation. The response includes a **`hasImage`** boolean — `true` when an image is stored. Use `GET /{id}/image` as the `` to display it.

400.description: Validation failed — missing required fields or invalid values

401.description: Unauthorized — JWT token missing or invalid

get.description: Returns the raw image bytes with the correct `Content-Type` header (e.g. `image/jpeg`). Use this URL directly as the `src` attribute of an `` tag. Returns **404** if no image has been uploaded for this hotel.

404.description: Hotel not found or no image uploaded

post.description: Uploads an image file and stores it as a BLOB in the database. Accepted types: **image/jpeg**, **image/png**, **image/webp**, **image/gif**. Re-uploading replaces the previous image. After a successful upload, **`hasImage`** will be `true` in the hotel response. Use `GET /{id}/image` directly as the `` to display it in the UI.

file.description: Image file (jpeg/png/webp/gif). Field name must be `file`.

200.description: Image uploaded — full hotel details returned

400.description: File is empty or not an image type

delete.description: Removes the stored image BLOB from the database for the given hotel. (ADMIN only)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all bookings. All filter params are optional. Valid `sortBy` values: `id`, `guestName`, `checkInDate`, `checkOutDate`, `totalPrice`, `bookingStatus`, `paymentStatus`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`. (ADMIN only)

parameters.name: bookingStatus
parameters.description: Filter by booking status. Allowed: PENDING, CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, COMPLETED, NO_SHOW

parameters.name: paymentStatus
parameters.description: Filter by payment status. Allowed: PENDING, PAID, REFUNDED, FAILED

post.description: Creates a new room booking for the authenticated user. **guestName**, **checkInDate**, **checkOutDate** and **roomId** are required. A unique **confirmationNumber** (e.g. BK-A1B2C3D4) and **totalPrice** (roomPrice × nights) are auto-calculated. The response includes **`roomType`**, **`roomNumber`**, **`hotelId`** and **`hotelName`** for display convenience. Default bookingStatus = PENDING, paymentStatus = PENDING.

400.description: Validation failed or invalid date range

409.description: Room already booked for selected dates

post.description: Cancels a booking by ID. **USER** can only cancel their own bookings. **ADMIN** can cancel any booking. If the booking was already **PAID**, a refund is automatically issued (`paymentStatus → REFUNDED`). Bookings with status **COMPLETED** or **NO_SHOW** cannot be cancelled. A descriptive cancellation message is included in the response.

403.description: Forbidden — cannot cancel another user's booking

409.description: Booking is already cancelled, completed, or a no-show

post.description:
Accepts a plain English query and returns results in two phases:

**Phase 1 — always runs:** Claude extracts `location`, `city`, `country`, `hotelName`, `starRating` and delegates to the existing hotel search filters.

**Phase 2 — runs when dates are present:** Claude additionally extracts `checkInDate` and `checkOutDate`, then returns only rooms that are AVAILABLE and have no overlapping bookings for those dates.

**Example queries:**
- `Hotels in Mumbai`
- `Hotels in Mumbai under ₹5000`
- `Available rooms in Singapore next weekend`
- `Hotels in New York from June 10 to June 15 under $300`

400.description: Blank query or query exceeds 500 characters

401.description: Unauthorized — JWT token missing or invalid

403.description: Forbidden — USER or ADMIN role required

500.description: AI service error — check that ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set correctly

post.description: Register a new application user and return profile metadata
Authenticate a user and return a JWT token with profile metadata

get.summary: Get all rooms for a hotel
get.description: Returns all rooms belonging to the specified hotel.

404.description: Hotel not found or no rooms exist

get.description: Looks up a hotel by its exact name (case-sensitive).

404.description: No hotel found with that name

get.description: Retrieves all bookings for a specific room. (ADMIN only)

404.description: Room not found or no bookings for room

get.description: Returns all bookings belonging to the currently authenticated user. Sorted by check-in date descending.

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Request body for creating or updating a room. roomNumber, price and hotelId are required.

hotelId.description: ID of the hotel this room belongs to

description.example: Spacious suite with ocean view and private balcony.

roomType.description: Room category. Allowed: SINGLE, DOUBLE, SUITE, DELUXE, FAMILY

bedType.description: Bed configuration e.g. KING, QUEEN, TWIN, DOUBLE

floorNumber.description: Floor on which the room is located

viewType.description: View type e.g. OCEAN, CITY, GARDEN, POOL, MOUNTAIN

status.description: Room operational status. Allowed: AVAILABLE, BOOKED, MAINTENANCE, OUT_OF_SERVICE

isActive.description: Whether the room is active and bookable. Defaults to true.

imageBase64.description: Base64-encoded image bytes. For UI uploads use POST /{id}/image instead.

imageContentType.description: MIME type of the image in imageBase64.

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Full room details returned by the API.

hotelId.description: ID of the hotel this room belongs to

hotelName.description: Name of the hotel this room belongs to

isActive.description: Whether the room is active and bookable

hasImage.description: True if a room image has been uploaded. Use GET /api/v1/rooms/{id}/image as to display it.

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Request body for creating or updating a hotel. Only name and location are required.

location.description: General location / area of the hotel

description.example: An iconic luxury hotel overlooking the Gateway of India.

city.description: City where the hotel is located

hotelType.description: Hotel classification. Allowed values: BUDGET, LUXURY, BOUTIQUE, RESORT, BUSINESS

checkInTime.description: Hotel check-in time in HH:mm format (24-hour clock)

checkOutTime.description: Hotel check-out time in HH:mm format (24-hour clock)

imageBase64.description: Base64-encoded image bytes. Use this field only for programmatic uploads. For UI uploads use the dedicated POST /{id}/image endpoint instead.

imageContentType.description: MIME type of the image provided in imageBase64. Required when imageBase64 is set.

amenities.description: List of amenities offered by the hotel

isActive.description: Whether the hotel is active and visible to users. Defaults to true if omitted.

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Full hotel details returned by the API.

description.example: An iconic luxury hotel overlooking the Gateway of India.

hasImage.description: True if a hotel image has been uploaded. Use GET /api/v1/hotels/{id}/image as to display it.

isActive.description: Whether the hotel is active and visible to users

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the hotel record was created (ISO-8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the hotel record was last updated (ISO-8601)

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Request body for creating or updating a booking. guestName, checkInDate, checkOutDate and roomId are required.

checkOutDate.description: Check-out date (ISO-8601: yyyy-MM-dd). Must be after checkInDate.

roomId.description: ID of the room to book

guestEmail.description: Guest email address for booking confirmation

bookingStatus.description: Booking lifecycle status. Allowed: PENDING, CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, COMPLETED, NO_SHOW. Defaults to PENDING on create.

paymentStatus.description: Payment status. Allowed: PENDING, PAID, REFUNDED, FAILED. Defaults to PENDING on create.

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Full booking details returned by the API.

totalPrice.description: Total price for the stay (room price × nights)

roomNumber.description: Room number of the booked room

roomType.description: Room category of the booked room

hotelId.description: ID of the hotel the room belongs to

hotelName.description: Name of the hotel the room belongs to

userId.description: ID of the user who made the booking

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Response returned after a mock payment is processed or refunded.

bookingId.description: Booking ID the payment belongs to

processedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was processed (ISO-8601)

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Request body to process a mock payment for an existing booking.

bookingId.description: ID of the booking to pay for

paymentMethod.description: Payment method. Allowed: CREDIT_CARD, DEBIT_CARD, UPI, CASH

amount.description: Amount to pay. Must match the booking total price.

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.d.description: Response returned after a booking is successfully cancelled.

message.example: Booking BK-A1B2C3D4 has been successfully cancelled.

refunded.description: Whether a refund was issued due to a prior PAID payment

query.example: Hotels in Mumbai under ₹5000 from June 10 to June 15

com.hotelbooking.simplehotelbookingapp.a.description: AI search response — matched hotels and, when dates were provided, available rooms.

query.example: Hotels in Mumbai under ₹5000 from June 10 to June 15

hotels.description: Hotels matching the extracted criteria (location, city, name, star rating).

availableRooms.description: Available rooms for the extracted date range. Only populated when check-in and check-out dates were found in the query.

availabilitySearch.description: True when check-in/check-out dates were extracted and availability was checked.

totalAvailableRooms.description: Total number of available rooms matched.
